results.name: cycle-tor-red-punisher
results.description: A vertical cycle of red punisher cards from Torment.

results.name: cycle-triland
results.description: Triland cycles. See also [triland](/tags/card/triland/) for non-cycle trilands.

results.name: cycle-tr-mage
results.description: A multi-set "mega cycle" of wizards that tutor for an artifact card of a specific mana value, with their card name starting with "Tr-"

results.name: cycle-tsp-no-mana-cost-suspend
results.description: A cycle of older cards, but now with suspend. (And no mana cost, so you have to use suspend)

results.name: cycle-und-enemy-colored-legend
results.description: Legends from Unsanctioned with an enemy-colored activated ability.

results.name: cycle-un-psychographics
results.description: A supercycle of legendary "gamer" creatures that are named after different Psychographics of Magic Players.

results.name: cycle-unspeakable
results.description: When cast in sequence, the three instants in question let their controller search their library for The Unspeakable and put it directly into play.

results.name: cycle-ust-flavor-variant
results.description: Cards in Unstable that have multiple versions with the same collector number, same name, same mana cost, and same rules text, but different art and/or flavor text.

results.name: cycle-ust-functional-variant
results.description: Cards in Unstable that have multiple versions with the same collector number, but different mana cost and/or rules text.

results.name: cycle-verge
results.description: Dual lands that allows you to tap for one color with no restrictions, but only allow you to tap for the other color if you have a land of one of two basic land types .
